entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The primary crop affected by bacterial blight and the target for resistance breeding

entities.name: ORYZA SATIVA
entities.description: The cultivated rice species into which the resistance gene was introgressed

entities.name: ORYZA RUFIPOGON ACC. CR100098A
entities.description: A wild rice accession that serves as the source of the novel bacterial blight resistance gene xa49(t)

entities.name: XANTHOMONAS ORYZAE PV. ORYZAE
entities.description: The bacterial pathogen responsible for causing bacterial blight in rice

entities.name: BACTERIAL BLIGHT
entities.description: An epidemic disease in rice caused by the pathogen Xanthomonas oryzae pv. oryzae

entities.name: BACTERIAL BLIGHT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The trait that allows rice plants to resist infection by Xanthomonas oryzae pv. oryzae

entities.name: XA49(T)
entities.description: A novel recessive resistance gene identified from Oryza rufipogon acc. CR100098A that confers resistance to bacterial blight

entities.name: BULKED SEGREGANT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A genetic mapping method used to localize the BB resistance gene

entities.name: SIMPLE SEQUENCE REPEAT MARKERS
entities.description: A type of molecular marker used for the localization and mapping of the resistance gene

entities.name: KASP MARKERS
entities.description: Kompetitive Allele Specific PCR markers designed for bulked segregant analysis

entities.name: GENOTYPING BY SEQUENCING
entities.description: A method used to generate data for the design of KASP markers

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 11
entities.description: The specific chromosome in the rice genome where the xa49(t) gene is located

entities.name: RM27235
entities.description: An SSR marker that brackets the BB resistance gene on chromosome 11

entities.name: RM2136
entities.description: An SSR marker that brackets the BB resistance gene on chromosome 11

entities.name: PAU11_65
entities.description: An SSR marker that flanks the xa49(t) gene within a 2.8 cM interval

entities.name: PAU11_44
entities.description: An SSR marker that flanks the xa49(t) gene within a 2.8 cM interval

entities.name: PUSA44
entities.description: A rice cultivar used as a parent in the crossing population

entities.name: PR114
entities.description: A rice cultivar used as a parent in the crossing population

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS RESISTANCE
entities.description: A general trait associated with the candidate genes identified within the xa49(t) region
